title: To The Shah From Hafiz
content:
Thy foes to hunt, thy enviers to strike down,
    Poises Arcturus aloft morning and evening his spear.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Ralph Waldo Emerson, titled "To The Shah From Hafiz", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
